title: Welcome to Servallab
body: Servallab is a survey quality control tool. Upload a CSV or Excel file to get started — it will automatically detect issues in your data and give you a structured report.

title: Upload your data
body: Use the sidebar to upload a CSV or Excel file. Servallab accepts .csv, .xlsx, and .xls formats. Once uploaded, QC checks run automatically.

title: Drag columns to configure checks
body: Once data is loaded, a column panel appears on the left. Drag any column into a check's target area, or type column names separated by commas.

title: QC Report tab
body: This tab shows all issues found in your data, grouped by severity — Critical, Warning, and Info. Expand any issue to see the flagged rows.

title: Logic Checks tab
body: Define conditional rules here: 'If column A meets a condition, column B should meet another condition.' Drag columns from the panel on the left into the rule builder.

title: Straightlining tab
body: Drag your base variable (e.g. interviewer ID) and your question columns here to detect respondents giving the same answer across all questions.

title: EDA tab
body: Drag columns to build custom charts. Choose from bar, line, scatter, heatmap, and more. You can combine multiple columns for multi-variable analysis.

title: Export your report
body: Click the Download Report button at the top right to get an Excel file with your QC flags, EDA summary, and clean data snapshot.
